'''Tisha Rostek''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent.

==Biography==
She served in the [[Dantooine base/Legends|Rebel base]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the first days of the Rebel Alliance. There, she met and fell in love with fellow Rebel [[Harovan Toth]]. They married and had a daughter, [[Samona]]; after that, Toth became an [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|infiltrator]] for the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForces]].

Tisha died during the [[Battle of Thovinack]]. After that, Toth sent his daughter to the Rebel safeworld [[Isis/Legends|Isis]], to live with dissenters from Toth's native planet [[Reynon]].
